body_transformation: Alakazam's rounded head now features smooth metallic plating with subtle engraved geometric patterns along the brow line, replacing its pale cream accents with gunmetal gray. Its short stubby legs are restructured into sleek, angular steel limbs with visible mechanical pistons at the joints, maintaining the bipedal stance. The pointed ears retain their upward curve but are now composed of polished steel with sharp, precise edges instead of soft flesh. The curled tail tip remains in its signature position but is transformed into a seamless steel extension with a deep indigo glow along its inner curve.
signature_feature: Head plating: gunmetal gray steel with engraved geometric patterns and subtle indigo energy lines.
